title: xanthoxalis filipes
intro: Xanthoxalis filipes, also known as wood sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family, characterized by its small, round leaves with yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of oxalic acid. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis filipes include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of Xanthoxalis filipes include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
